title: S35-03: per-IP delta scoring in DIS log tailer
body: --findings Added ipTracker (bounded per-/24 prefix map, evicts at 65535 entries) to cmd/dis. parseNginxCombined now populates rec.IPPrefix. applyDeltaScore() adds +30 to Score when inter-request delta <20ms, matching golden.md axiom. Tracker persists across logrotate cycles in tailFile. All tests pass: TestParseIPPrefix, TestIPTrackerDelta, TestApplyDeltaScore, TestDeltaScoreBurstRaisesHostileRatio, TestParseNginxCombinedIPPrefix.
